channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [KRANTI] Kranti Industries: 2.5 Lakh Convertible Warrants Lapsed
item.description:
Kranti Industries Ltd. announced that 12,50,000 warrants out of 15,00,000 warrants held by Evolution Capital Advisory Services Private Limited were converted into equity shares. The remaining 2,50,000 warrants were not converted by the deadline of April 22, 2026, resulting in the forfeiture of ₹50,00,000 received upfront. This is in accordance with SEBI regulations, subject to board approval. The original allotment was made on October 23, 2024, at ₹80 per warrant, with ₹20 received upfront.

  • 12,50,000 warrants converted into equity shares by Evolution Capital.
  • 2,50,000 warrants lapsed due to non-conversion by April 22, 2026.
  • ₹50,00,000 forfeited due to warrant lapse, pending board approval.
  • Original warrant allotment was on October 23, 2024, at ₹80 per warrant.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kranti Industries Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [ORIBEVER] Orient Beverages appoints Raj Kumar Singh as Independent Director
item.description:
Orient Beverages Ltd. announced the appointment of Sri Raj Kumar Singh (DIN-07237275) as an Additional Director, categorized as an Independent Non-Executive Director. This appointment was approved by the Board of Directors at their meeting held on April 22, 2026, and is effective from the same date. Sri Raj Kumar Singh is a Commerce graduate with over 20 years of experience in managing financial operations and overall business administration within a family-run business, skills expected to contribute significantly to the company's efficiency and growth.

  • Orient Beverages appointed Sri Raj Kumar Singh as an Additional Director.
  • He joins as an Independent Non-Executive Director from April 22, 2026.
  • Singh brings over 20 years of experience in finance and business administration.
  • His expertise is expected to enhance the company's efficiency and growth.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ORIENT BEVERAGES LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [SRGHFL] SRG Housing Finance Board approves ₹2,500 Cr borrowing limit hike
item.description:
🔥 Trending

SRG Housing Finance Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting on April 23, 2026, approved a proposal to increase the company's borrowing powers under Section 180(1)(c) of the Companies Act, 2013, up to an amount not exceeding ₹2,500 Crores. Additionally, the Board also approved the creation of charges on movable and immovable assets to secure borrowings up to the same limit of ₹2,500 Crores, including existing borrowings. Both approvals are subject to the consent of the company's shareholders, for which a postal ballot notice will be issued shortly.

  • Board approved increasing borrowing limit to ₹2,500 Cr.
  • Shareholder approval is required for the enhanced limit.
  • Company can create charges on assets for borrowings up to ₹2,500 Cr.
  • This move facilitates future funding and growth opportunities.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SRG HOUSING FINANCE LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RAJESH] Rajesh Power Services: FY26 Revenue ₹163.34 Mn, PAT ₹18.99 Mn
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Rajesh Power Services Ltd has announced its audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the half-year and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The Board of Directors approved the results on April 23, 2026. The company reported total income of ₹163.34 million and profit before tax of ₹18.99 million for the year ended March 31, 2026. The board also recommended a final dividend of 10% (₹1 per share) subject to shareholder approval. Additionally, M/s Naimish N. Shah & Co and M/s Aanal Satyawadi & Co were appointed as internal and secretarial auditors, respectively, for the financial year 2026-27.

  • Rajesh Power Services approved audited FY26 results with ₹163.34 Mn total income.
  • The company's profit before tax for FY26 stood at ₹18.99 Mn.
  • A final dividend of 10% (₹1 per share) was recommended for FY26.
  • M/s Naimish N. Shah & Co appointed as Internal Auditor for FY27.
  • M/s Aanal Satyawadi & Co appointed as Secretarial Auditor for FY27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rajesh Power Services Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [NEWGEN] Newgen Board to meet Apr 30 for FY26 results & dividend
item.description:
Newgen Software Technologies Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on Thursday, April 30, 2026. The primary agenda items for this meeting include the consideration and approval of the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the Quarter and Financial Year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board will consider and recommend a dividend on equity shares for the financial year 2025-2026, subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming Annual General Meeting. The trading window for the company's shares has been closed from March 31, 2026, and will remain closed until May 02, 2026 (inclusive).

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 30, 2026.
  • To approve Q4 and FY26 Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results.
  • To consider and recommend dividend for FY 2025-2026.
  • Trading window closed from March 31 to May 02, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Newgen Software Technologies Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [UNIDT] United Drilling Tools Bags ₹31.66 Mn Order from Vedanta
item.description:
🔥 Trending

United Drilling Tools Ltd (UDTL) has secured an order from Vedanta Limited for the supply of critical oilfield equipment. The order, valued at ₹31.66 million, includes tubing, pup joints, and crossovers. UDTL will supply these essential components within 3-4 months, reinforcing its position as a key domestic supplier. The equipment is crucial for oil and gas production, with tubing used for extraction, pup joints for length adjustment, and crossovers for connecting different tubing sections. This order reflects Vedanta's confidence in UDTL's capabilities and product quality.

  • United Drilling Tools secures ₹31.66 Mn order from Vedanta Limited.
  • The order includes supply of tubing, pup joints, and crossovers.
  • Order execution is expected within 3-4 months.
  • This reinforces UDTL's position as a trusted domestic supplier.
  • The order reflects Vedanta's confidence in UDTL's product quality.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: UNITED DRILLING TOOLS LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [DIFFNKG] Diffusion Engineers bags ₹9.88 Cr order for cement industry parts
item.description:
Diffusion Engineers Limited has secured a domestic order valued at approximately INR 9.88 Crores. The order is for the supply of Vertical Roller Mill and Separators Parts to a client in the cement industry. The company expects to complete the supply by December 31, 2026. This contract represents a significant business update, contributing to the company's order book.

  • Secured domestic order worth approximately ₹9.88 Crores.
  • Order involves supply of Vertical Roller Mill and Separators Parts.
  • Parts are to be supplied to the cement industry.
  • Delivery timeline extends up to December 31, 2026.
  • Enhances company's order book and revenue visibility.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Diffusion Engineers Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [UJJIVANSFB] Ujjivan SFB receives 'Strong' ESG Rating of 65 for FY25
item.description:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Limited has been assigned an ESG Rating of '65' (Rating Category: Strong) by ESG Risk Assessments and Insights Limited, a SEBI-registered Category I Subscriber-Pays ESG rating provider. This voluntary rating, received on April 22, 2026, pertains to the financial year 2025 and is based on the Bank’s public disclosures and other publicly available information. The intimation is also available on the Bank's website.

  • Ujjivan SFB received a 'Strong' ESG Rating of 65.
  • Rating assigned by SEBI-registered ESG Risk Assessments.
  • The voluntary rating covers the financial year 2025.
  • Based on public disclosures and available information.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Ltd | Category: ESG

item.title: [SOFTBPO] Softbpo Global Services Addresses BSE Warning Letter
item.description:
Softbpo Global Services Ltd's Board of Directors addressed a warning letter received from BSE Limited on April 21, 2026. The board discussed the letter's contents and approved corrective and preventive measures to ensure compliance with SEBI regulations and prevent future occurrences. The board meeting was held on April 23, 2026, commencing at 11:30 A.M. and concluding at 12:25 P.M.

  • Softbpo Global Services received a warning letter from BSE Limited on April 21, 2026.
  • The Board approved corrective actions to ensure SEBI regulation compliance.
  • The board meeting was held on April 23, 2026, and concluded within an hour.
  • No other material business was transacted during the board meeting.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SOFTBPO GLOBAL SERVICES LTD. | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [INDUSTOWER] Indus Towers Board to meet on Apr 30 for Q4/FY26 results
item.description:
Indus Towers Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene a meeting on Thursday, April 30, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting is to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results, both Standalone and Consolidated, for the fourth quarter and the full financial year ending March 31, 2026. Additionally, the company has informed that the trading window for its shares remains closed for all Designated Persons until Saturday, May 02, 2026, in compliance with SEBI regulations.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 30, 2026.
  • To consider and approve Q4 and FY26 Audited Financial Results.
  • Trading window for shares closed until May 02, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Indus Towers Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
